zh.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard是Hugh Giffard的女兒，於1192年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓。她於1214年之前與Adam Seton在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1244年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard是Hugh Giffard的女儿，于1192年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓。她于1214年之前与Adam Seton在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1244年在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard was born in 1192, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland as the daughter of Hugh Giffard. She married Adam Seton before 1214, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1244, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard est née en 1192, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, fille de Hugh Giffard. Elle a épousé Adam Seton avant 1214, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1244, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard wurde 1192 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, als Tochter von Hugh Giffard geboren. Sie hat vor 1214 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland Adam Seton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1244 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard è nata il nel 1192 nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland come figlia di Hugh Giffard. Lei sposato Adam Seton prima del 1214, nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1244, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Giffardは1192年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンでHugh Giffardの娘として生まれた。1214年以前にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアでAdam Setonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1244年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard(은)는 1192년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 Hugh Giffard의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1214년 이전 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 Adam Seton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard nasceu em 1192, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland filha de Hugh Giffard. Ela casou-se com Adam Seton antes 1214, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1244, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard родилась в 1192 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. Её отца звали Hugh Giffard. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam Seton перед 1214 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1244 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Janet Giffard nació en 1192, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland como hija de Hugh Giffard. Se casó con Adam Seton antes de 1214, en Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1244, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
